---
name: scrum-wrap-up
description: "Scrum Workflow: Conclude the current session by summarizing completed work, open items, and decisions made. Use when the user says 'wrap up', 'end session', or '/scrum-wrap-up'."
---

Load and execute the framework command at `scrum_workflow/commands/wrap-up.md`.

The command file contains the full workflow orchestration including:
- Summarize completed stories and work
- List open items and next steps
- Consolidate session decisions
- Persist context for next session resume
